name: Brecon Beacons Horseshoe (4 Peaks)
highlights: Classic ridge traverse over Cribyn, Pen y Fan, Corn Du and Fan y Big.
viewpoints: Drops to Cwm Cynwyn and Cwm Sere; Diving Board at Fan y Big
picnic_spots: Diving Board (Fan y Big); Bwlch ar y Fan saddle
parking_start: Cwm Gwdi or Neuadd Reservoir parking
food_drink_nearby: Red Lion Talybont; White Hart Inn Talybont
hazards_notes: Long, exposed day; navigation skills needed in mist
